# LLMS.txt - ATV Roatan Website Guide

Website Name: ATV Roatan
Website URL: https://atvroatan.com/
Website Purpose: Adventure, wildlife, and combo tours in Roatan, Honduras. Target cruise passengers, families, and adventure travelers. Highlight ATV & Buggy, zipline, wildlife encounters, snorkeling, beaches, and cultural experiences.

# Brand Guidelines
Brand Name: ATV Roatan
Tone: Friendly, adventurous, approachable, clear, conversion-focused
Language: English (easy to understand, no AI-sounding phrases)
SEO Focus: Cruise excursions, adventure tours, wildlife experiences, Roatan shore excursions
Target Audience: Cruise passengers, tourists, adventure seekers, families, couples

# Main Website Categories
1. Combo Adventure Tours
   - Monkey & Sloth Hangout + ATV/Jungle Buggy Adventure
   - Zipline & Jungle ATV + Beach Combo
   - Snorkeling + ATV Buggy + Wildlife Tours
2. Wildlife & Nature Tours
   - Monkey & Sloth Sanctuary Roatan
   - Wildlife Encounters
   - Eco Nature Parks
3. ATV & Buggy Adventures
   - Off-Road Jungle ATV Tours
   - Muddy Jungle Buggy Adventure
   - Private ATV Excursions
4. Zipline & Canopy Tours
   - Jungle Canopy Zipline Tour
   - Combo Zipline & Beach Tours
5. Beach & Water Activities
   - West Bay Beach Day Pass
   - Snorkeling Tours
   - Parasailing & Water Sports
6. Customizable Tours
   - 5-Day Roatan Custom Packages
   - Private VIP Island Experiences

# Main Keywords
- Roatan shore excursions
- Roatan adventure tours
- ATV Roatan tours
- Monkey & Sloth Sanctuary Roatan
- Roatan ATV jungle tour
- Roatan zipline adventure
- Roatan snorkeling tours
- Roatan combo tours
- Roatan private tours
- Roatan beaches & wildlife

# Long-Tail Keywords
- Roatan ATV buggy jungle adventure with sloths
- Private Roatan wildlife & beach tour
- Roatan zipline and monkey encounter for cruise passengers
- Ultimate Roatan adventure: zipline, ATV, sloth sanctuary
- Best combo tours in Roatan for families and couples

# On-Page SEO Guidelines
- Keep titles ≤ 60 characters
- Keep meta descriptions ≤ 160 characters
- Include brand name "ATV Roatan" in titles & descriptions
- Focus on high-intent keywords (Monkey & Sloth, ATV, Zipline, Beach)
- Write in human-friendly easy English
- Avoid repetitive words and AI-sounding phrases
- Use H1, H2, H3 to structure content with main and secondary keywords
- Include call-to-actions (Book Now, Reserve Today)

# Content Guidelines
- Highlight adventure, wildlife, and island culture
- Emphasize safety, professional guides, and cruise-friendly scheduling
- Mention included amenities (port pickup, equipment, restrooms, snacks, beach access)
- Describe experiences with vivid but simple language
- Include combo tours and multi-activity packages
- Keep paragraphs short and scannable

# Example Tours and URLs
- Roatan Wildlife + ATV Adventure: /roatan-wildlife-atv-adventure/
- Roatan Zipline Adventure, Sloths & Chocolate Factory: /roatan-zipline-sloths-chocolate-tour/
- Monkey & Sloth Hangout + ATV & Buggy Jungle Adventure: /monkey-sloth-atv-buggy-jungle-adventure/
- Roatan Sky & Sea Adventure: Parasailing & West Bay Beach: /roatan-sky-sea-parasailing-west-bay/
- Off-Road Buggy ATV Muddy Jungle Adventure & Private Beach: /off-road-buggy-atv-jungle-beach/
- Private Taste of Roatan: Sloth Encounter, Brewery & Beach: /private-roatan-sloth-brewery-beach-tour/
- Roatan VIP Dolphin Action + Monkey & Sloth Hangout: /roatan-vip-dolphin-monkey-sloth-tour/
- Jungle Canopy Zipline Tour: /jungle-canopy-zipline-tour/
- Mahogany Bay Off-Road Safari: Extreme Jungle: /mahogany-bay-off-road-safari/
- Customizable 5-Day Roatan Tour: /customizable-5-day-roatan-tour/
- Private Roatan Mangrove Snorkeling & Garifuna Culture + ATV: /roatan-mangrove-snorkeling-garifuna-atv/
- Buggy ATV Jungle Adventure & Beach Break: /buggy-atv-jungle-beach/
- Horseback Riding, ATV Buggy Jungle Trail & Private Beach Club Pool: /horseback-atv-jungle-beach-tour/
- Roatan Adventure Trio: Canopy Zipline, Sloth Encounter & West Bay Beach: /roatan-adventure-trio-zipline-sloth-beach/
- Roatan Semi-Submarine Reef Explorer & West Bay Beach: /roatan-semi-submarine-reef-beach/
- Private ATV Jungle Expedition: Sloth Park & West Bay Beach Club: /private-atv-jungle-sloth-beach/
- Canopy Zipline, Sloth Encounter & Coral Reef Snorkeling: /zipline-sloth-snorkeling-tour/
- Roatan Sky & Sea Adventure: Parasailing & West Bay Beach Resort: /roatan-parasailing-west-bay/
- Boat Snorkel, Canopy Zipline & West Bay Beach Club: /boat-snorkel-zipline-beach/
- Sloths, Zipline, Horseback & West Bay Beach: /sloths-zipline-horseback-beach/
- Roatan Adrenaline Rush: Private ATV, Zipline & Sloth Sanctuary: /roatan-adrenaline-atv-zipline-sloth/
- Roatan Quad-Adventure: Private ATV, Zipline, Horseback & Beach Club: /roatan-quad-adventure-atv-zipline-beach/
- Ultimate Roatan ATV & Buggy Jungle Tour: Monkeys, Sloths & Private Beach: /ultimate-roatan-atv-buggy-jungle-tour/
- Roatan Sightseeing & ATV Adventure: Sloths, Chocolate Factory & Beach Club: /roatan-sightseeing-atv-sloths-chocolate/
- Mega Combo: Roatan Zipline, ATV/Buggy Adventure, Sloths & Chocolate Factory: /roatan-mega-combo-zipline-atv-sloths-chocolate/
- Ultimate Roatan Zipline, Off-Road ATV, Sloth Sanctuary & Beach Pool Access: /ultimate-roatan-zipline-atv-sloth-beach/
- Private Taste of Roatan: Sloth Encounter, Brewery Tasting & Beach Luxury: /private-roatan-sloth-brewery-beach-tour/

# Tone & Style
- Friendly, approachable, informative
- Encourage booking with action-driven language
- Adventure, fun, excitement at the core
- Avoid overly technical or flowery language
- Short sentences, active voice

# Miscellaneous
- Emphasize cruise passenger convenience (port pickup, timed tours)
- Highlight family & group-friendly activities
- Include local culture and eco-tourism aspects
- Use location mentions (Roatan, Honduras, West Bay Beach, Mahogany Bay)
- Include amenities: restrooms, changing rooms, snacks, beach chairs, safety equipment
